title: Largesse
description: Another player adds 1 random Colorless card to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
upgraded_description: Another player adds 1 random [gold]Upgraded[/gold] Colorless card to their [gold]Hand[/gold].
notes: Multiplayer only. When played, a random unlocked Colorless card is added to the target ally player's hand. If this card is upgraded, the generated card is also automatically upgraded.
